name: Heyndrickxia coagulans TBC169 synbiotic
summary: Synbiotic product combining Heyndrickxia coagulans TBC169 with dietary-fiber components, tracked for a middle-aged and elderly chronic-constipation randomized trial.
mechanism_summary: Combines a probiotic spore-forming bacterial strain with fiber-related components to shift stool-function outcomes and post-intervention microbiome composition in a constipation population.

open_questions: Whether constipation symptom gains persist after treatment stops
Whether microbiome changes are causal given missing baseline fecal samples
Whether the signal generalizes beyond chronic constipation to aging-relevant function or resilience
